name: Pizza Dippers (Not Bad)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the sausage, crumbling it as you go, and drain any excess fat.
2. In a bowl, mix together flour, grated Parmesan cheese, and salt.
3. Cut in shortening using a pastry cutter or your fingers until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
4. Gradually stir in the sausage with the reserved water, adding a bit at a time until the dough can be shaped into balls.
5. Shape the dough into 10-12 small balls.
6. Bake the balls for 10-12 minutes at 450°F (230°C) until golden brown.
7. Serve the baked balls with toothpicks and pizza sauce to dip.
Note: Ensure all equipment is clean before starting, and be careful when handling hot oil or utensils in the oven.
